title: Ruling up — accurate guidelines for calligraphy practice
sources: Edward Johnston, Writing and Illuminating and Lettering (1906) — chapter on ruling and preparing the page
notes: The two methods: direct ruling with H pencil (erases cleanly) and the light-box guide-sheet method (rule one master sheet, use under every practice page without re-ruling). Covers the nib-width staircase for setting x-height, ascender, and descender lines. British A4 as default; A5 for smaller-format practice books.
